message.content:
Research and explain:

1. **Harness** - What is Harness in the context of software development? Focus on:
   - What it does
   - CI/CD capabilities
   - Testing features
   - How it integrates with projects

2. **BMAD** - Search for BMAD methodology/framework. Look for:
   - What BMAD stands for
   - How it's used in project management/development
   - Key components and workflows
   - How it structures projects

3. **Comparison** - How do these two approaches differ and complement each other?

Use web search if needed to get accurate and current information about both.

content.text: I'll research both Harness and BMAD for you. Let me start with web searches to get current, accurate information.

Based on my search results, here's what I found about the BMAD methodology framework for project management:

## BMAD Method Overview

The BMAD Method (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-Driven Development) provides a systematic framework that transforms scattered AI interactions into orchestrated, production-ready workflows.

### Core Concept

At its core, it is a brilliantly simple yet powerful method for taming the often chaotic process of "vibe coding" and replacing it with a structured, persona-driven workflow. Rather than a single, unstructured conversation with a Large Language Model (LLM), B-MAD organizes the entire development process around distinct, specialized AI agents.

### Key Components

BMad Core provides the universal framework for human-AI collaboration. BMad Method leverages Core to deliver agile development workflows. BMad Builder lets you create custom modules as powerful as BMad Method itself.

### Specialized AI Agents

BMAD sets up a clear structure of roles (personas) — like Analyst, Architect, Developer, QA, Project Manager — and gives each role a defined way of working.

### Workflow Structure

The BMAD Method follows a structured workflow, typically starting with planning and moving into a continuous development cycle. The planning phase focuses on defining the project scope, requirements, and technical architecture.

The workflow includes:
- The analyst agent creates a project brief. The pm agent takes that brief as a dependency to create a product requirements document (PRD). The architect agent then uses the PRD to design the system's architecture.

### Key Innovations

The BMad Method is a groundbreaking shift in how AI collaborates with humans to build software. At its core are two revolutionary innovations: Dedicated planning agents — Analyst, Project Manager, and Architect — work together (and with you) to generate highly structured, context-rich documentation.(no content)This guarantees zero context loss and eliminates confusion for Dev and QA agents—two of the most common issues in traditional AI-assisted dev environments.

### Installation

You can install it via: `npx bmad-method@alpha install` for v6 Alpha (recommended) or `npx bmad-method install` for stable v4 for production.

### Applications Beyond Software

BMad isn't just for building software — it's a universal agentic framework that works across any domain. With Expansion Packs, you can transform how AI helps you in diverse fields like: Creative Writing, Business Strategy, Health & Wellness, Education, and Content Creation.

The official repository is available at: https://github.com/bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD

Links: [{"title":"Harness: AI for DevOps, Testing, AppSec, and Cost Optimization","url":"https://www.harness.io"},{"title":"GitHub - harness/harness: Harness Open Source is an end-to-end developer platform with Source Control Management, CI/CD Pipelines, Hosted Developer Environments, and Artifact Registries.","url":"https://github.com/harness/harness"},{"title":"Harness.io: Product Editions, Architecture, and CI/CD Features","url":"https://codefresh.io/learn/harness-io/"},{"title":"Understanding CI/CD Platforms","url":"https://www.harness.io/blog/understanding-ci-cd-platforms-the-backbone-of-modern-devops"},{"title":"Report: Harness Business Breakdown & Founding Story | Contrary Research","url":"https://research.contrary.com/company/harness"},{"title":"Harness as a Software Continuous Delivery Platform | by Eduar Baron | Globant | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/globant/harness-as-a-software-continuous-delivery-platform-4cab8bd47859"},{"title":"Harness CD Platform Now Available via Source-Available License - DevOps.com","url":"https://devops.com/harness-cd-platform-now-available-via-source-available-license/"},{"title":"Harness.io: Features, Pricing, Limitations & Alternatives |","url":"https://octopus.com/devops/harness/"},{"title":"Follow this Harness IO tutorial to get started with CI/CD | TechTarget","url":"https://www.techtarget.com/searchsoftwarequality/feature/Follow-this-Harness-IO-tutorial-to-get-started-with-CI-CD"},{"title":"What is Harness?","url":"https://www.statsig.com/perspectives/what-is-harness"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Harness as a software development CI/CD platform:

## Harness CI/CD Platform Overview

Harness is a company that provides an automated continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) solution, integrating with vendors across the DevOps stack to help developers develop, deploy, monitor, and remedy distributed microservices architecture.

### Company Background
Founded in 2017 by Jyoti Bansal (CEO) and Rishi Singh (CTO), Harness provides a continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) platform for both cloud and on-prem projects.(no content)As the founder and CEO of AppDynamics, Bansal oversaw its acquisition by Cisco in 2017 before co-founding Harness.

### Key Features

Harness combines the industry's fastest, most secure CI/CD with developer self-service to automate pipelines, infrastructure, and the entire path from code to production.

The platform offers:
- Harness is a platform that offers solutions for all phases of software delivery aimed at accelerating innovation and delivering software faster. It provides specialized tools for each step in the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), such as Continuous Integration, Continuous Delivery, Feature Flags, Chaos Engineering, and Continuous Error Tracking.

- One of the key features of Harness is its use of machine learning for intelligent deployment decisions. By analyzing historical deployment data and monitoring real-time performance metrics, Harness can automatically determine the optimal deployment strategy for your application. This includes techniques like canary releases, blue-green deployments, and rolling updates.

### Open Source Offering
Harness Open Source is an end-to-end developer platform with Source Control Management, CI/CD Pipelines, Hosted Developer Environments, and Artifact Registries.(no content)Harness Open Source represents a massive investment in the next generation of Drone. Where Drone focused solely on continuous integration, Harness adds source code hosting, developer environments (gitspaces), and artifact registries; providing teams with an end-to-end, open source DevOps platform.

### Drone Acquisition
Harness provides CI through Drone, which was acquired by Harness in 2020. Drone now works as part of the Harness ecosystem to provide a unified CI/CD platform for software delivery.

### Security Features
